scripts.build: bun run build:studio && bun run build:core
scripts.build:studio: bun run --filter @flexweave/studio build && bun run --filter @flexweave/studio-app build
scripts.check: ultracite check && bun run check:core && bun run check:studio
scripts.check:core: bun run check:core:fmt && bun run check:core:lint
scripts.check:studio: bun run check:studio:package && bun run check:studio:app && bun run check:studio:boundary
scripts.test: bun run test:core && bun run test:studio
scripts.test:studio: bun run --filter @flexweave/studio test && bun run --filter @flexweave/studio-app test
scripts.verify: bun run check && bun run test && bun run build && bun run verify:studio-host-app && bun run docs:core
scripts.verify:core: bun run check:core && bun run test:core && bun run build:core && bun run docs:core
scripts.verify:studio: bun run check:studio && bun run test:studio && bun run build:studio && bun run verify:studio-host-app
